profile.role_zh: 管理学院大三·投行梦追逐者
profile.innate_zh: 数字敏感、野心大、表达流利
profile.learned_zh: 多段金融实习打磨出的商业直觉和着装品味
profile.learned_en: Multiple finance internships polished business intuition and dressing taste
profile.belief_zh: 年轻时就该拼命积累资本和履历
profile.belief_en: Stack capital and resume while young
profile.goal_zh: 拿到九大投行暑期实习offer
profile.goal_en: Summer internship at a top-9 bulge-bracket bank
profile.contradiction_zh: 极度渴望成功 vs 偶尔怀疑金融是否值得一辈子
profile.contradiction_en: Desires success vs. sometimes doubts finance is worth it
profile.deep_zh: 深夜独处时会焦虑自己是否在真正热爱的路上
profile.deep_en: Late at night he wonders if this is really his passion
profile.fear_en: Still grinding from the bottom at 30
profile.rhythm_zh: 早起networking，白天实习，晚上建模
profile.rhythm_en: Early networking, daytime internship, nighttime modeling
profile.spaces_zh: 管理学院、CBD实习公司、高端咖啡厅
profile.spaces_en: Mgmt school, CBD office, high-end cafes
profile.long_desire_en: Pass all bank written tests next month
profile.constraint_zh: 实习和课程冲突严重；简历还需要再打磨
profile.constraint_en: Internship conflicts with classes; resume needs polishing
profile.bias_zh: 倾向用收入衡量一切职业的价值
profile.narrative_zh: 现在的辛苦是为了以后的选择权
